nasb.text: Then Joshua spoke to the Lord in the day when the Lord delivered up the Amorites before the sons of Israel, and he said in the sight of Israel, “O sun, stand still at Gibeon, And O moon in the valley of Aijalon.”

esv.text: At that time Joshua spoke to the Lord in the day when the Lord gave the Amorites over to the sons of Israel, and he said in the sight of Israel, “Sun, stand still at Gibeon, and moon, in the Valley of Aijalon.”

cnv.text: 那時，就是耶和華把亞摩利人交給以色列人的時候，約書亞在以色列人面前對耶和華說： “太陽啊，停在基遍； 月亮啊，停在亞雅崙谷。”

ccb.text: 耶和华将亚摩利人交在以色列人手中，那天约书亚当众向耶和华祷告： “太阳啊，停在基遍！ 月亮啊，停在亚雅仑谷！”
